title: Design File System
problem_statement: Design a file system that supports creating paths with values and retrieving values using path strings.
intuition: Choose data structures that optimize for the required operations.

approaches.name: Optimal Solution
approaches.description: A clean explanation of the optimal approach will be added here.

interview_qa.a: Choose the topic-specific pattern that best fits the problem and avoid naive brute force.

interview_qa.q: How do you handle edge cases?
interview_qa.a: Check for empty or minimal input before applying the main algorithm.
